en: Hello guys and welcome to NECA, Native English for Kids and Adults.
Well, today's video is another slang word.
And the slang word for today is fluke, fluke.
Fluke simply means lucky stroke, lucky stroke.
As in, you passed the test, but it was a fluke.
You passed the test, but it was a luck.
So thank you so much for watching and I'll see you in the next one.
